notes_for_human_reviewer: Solid intermediate. Identifies five distinct failure modes correctly categorised. Surfacing moves are differentiated by channel (BA note vs RAID vs PM 1:1). Downstream artefacts named (UAT defects, load testing, integration-sprint slip). Posture is appropriate ('not proposing to second-guess Priya'). Misses incompleteness in REQ-4.1.5 (no max document count, no virus scan, no failure-mode behaviour) and the wrong-level-of-abstraction issue across multiple requirements. Traceability reasoning is correct but light — names the orphaned REQ-4.1.9 without proposing systematic next steps. Not yet hire-ready because the analysis is competent but not yet a step ahead of the BA.
